'''鈭歵-l-s-z''' ('''katalsezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:braai|braai]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:braai|braai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-l-s-z
|-
! Lemma
| katalsezoko
|}
